title: Energizing Mexican Noodles Enchiladas
description: A bright, floral twist on classic enchiladas that blends rice stick noodles with fresh herbs, chickpeas, and a tangy lime‑flavored sauce, all served in a traditional stone bowl for a warming, Mediterranean‑friendly meal.
instructions: Cook the rice stick noodles in salted boiling water for 6 to 8 minutes until al dente, then drain and set aside.
Saute the garlic and onion in olive oil over medium heat until fragrant and translucent.
Add the bell pepper and jalapeno to the pan and cook for 3 minutes.
Stir in the chickpeas, corn kernels, and tomato sauce, then simmer for 5 minutes to blend the flavors.
Fold in the cooked noodles, cilantro, and lime juice, stirring until everything is well coated.
Heat a stone bowl (dolsot) over medium heat until it shimmers.
Ladle the noodle mixture into the hot stone bowl, covering the surface with a generous sprinkle of feta cheese.
Return the bowl to the stove and cover with a lid; let it steam for 5 minutes to allow the cheese to melt.
Serve the enchiladas hot, garnished with extra cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
